message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Verified a11y fixes, approval reconfirmed">
Verified the updated template. The `<time>` element sits inside the existing `.waiting-for-item__date` span, so CSS styling is inherited with no visual change. The aria-label updates are invisible to sighted users. No visual design concerns.

My approval stands. Consensus confirmed from Steve Schoger.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Thanks Steve. All 9 approvals confirmed. Waiting on the project owner to fix the GPG signing agent so we can commit.

**Project owner** -- to unblock us, we need the SSH/GPG signing agent restarted. All work is complete: code staged, pipeline green (220 tests + 11 Playwright), 9/9 team consensus. The only thing preventing the commit is `Couldn't sign message (signer): communication with agent failed?`.
